category_sources: Official GNOME Help manual describes Zenity as creating simple dialogs.
source_facts.description says Zenity provides GTK+ dialog boxes for the command line.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME Help manual title is Zenity Manual.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Help provides the Zenity Manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GNOME GitLab source-control URL.
source_facts.source-archive is distributed from download.gnome.org for Zenity releases.
tags_sources: Official GNOME Help manual documents Zenity dialog usage.
source_facts.description identifies GTK+ dialogs for command-line use.
